name: Apple Pay Payment Token
description: Represents the Apple Pay payment token generated by the Secure Element on the user's device after biometric or passcode authorization. Contains encrypted payment credentials (DPAN, cryptogram) that must be decrypted by the merchant or payment service provider to process the transaction.

paymentData.description: The encrypted payment data containing the payment credential

data.description: Base64-encoded encrypted payment data. When decrypted, contains the DPAN, expiration date, and payment cryptogram

signature.description: Base64-encoded detached PKCS #7 signature covering the payment and header data, signed by Apple. Used to verify the token originated from a genuine Apple device

header.description: Header containing key information for decrypting the payment data

applicationData.description: SHA-256 hash (hex-encoded) of the applicationData from the original payment request. Present only if applicationData was provided

ephemeralPublicKey.description: Base64-encoded X.509 encoded ephemeral EC public key. Present only for EC_v1 tokens. Used with merchant private key for ECDH key agreement

wrappedKey.description: Base64-encoded symmetric key encrypted with the merchant's RSA public key. Present only for RSA_v2 tokens

publicKeyHash.description: Base64-encoded SHA-256 hash of the merchant's payment processing certificate public key. Identifies which certificate to use for decryption

transactionId.description: Hex-encoded transaction identifier generated by the device

version.description: The version of the payment token encryption scheme. EC_v1 uses Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman key exchange; RSA_v2 uses RSA key wrapping

paymentMethod.description: Information about the payment card and method used

displayName.description: A localized user-facing description of the payment card, e.g., 'Visa 1234'

network.description: The payment network, such as Visa, Mastercard, or Amex

type.description: The type of card used for the payment

transactionIdentifier.description: A unique identifier for this payment transaction, assigned by Apple Pay
